name_en: Premium Original Leather M25476 Purple Small. Inspired by Baroque jewelry, this Capucines Small bag features shell Monogram floral accents on the chain, reflecting the vibrant style of the new Daydream collection. Crafted in Taurillon calfskin with a refined silhouette, the flap can be worn open or closed. Removable shoulder strap for versatile carrying. Dimensions: 30 × 19 × 9 cm
